creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Thanks for your PR Oliver.  I agree with Eijiro here, and I was 
considering hosting the distfile myself.  However, since this is a more 
general problem with fetch, I think it would be prudent to hold out 
until bin/171402 is committed rather than put ad-hoc fixes into ports. 
I'm glad you've got it installed now.
